positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial botanical illustration. Focus on bioluminescent glowing flora (like glowing lilies and orchids) intertwined with stylized crescent moons and delicate geometric constellations. The aesthetic should be Neo-Art Nouveau meets modern vector graphic, featuring strong, crisp black line work and a deep, contrasting color palette: midnight blue, rich indigo, and deep violet, accented by neon cyan and emerald green glowing highlights. The composition must have a clean silhouette, central focus, and be designed for high-contrast commercial print on fabric.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, poor quality, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, ugly, messy, grainy
